case_title: RESTORATION WORKSHOP, LLC VS WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO. HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO. IS GRANTED, SET FOR HEARING ON JAN-09-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY; DEFENDANT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. NO EVIDENCE RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESTORATION WORKSHOP, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO. IS GRANTED. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PRESENT. THE COURT'S RECORDS DO NOT REFLECT THE ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF EXECUTION. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RESTORATION WORKSHOP, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODWORKS WINDOWS & DOOR CO.
PLAINTIFF FILED AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM CHANGING PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S NAMES AND AMOUNT OF WHAT DEFENDANT OWES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK-BETH WILBER (506)
